type: CLAIM

type: STATUS
files: src/click/core.py:Option.__init__,Option.get_help_record,Command.main;src/click/types.py
summary: Overlap noted on core.py/types.py; I will touch Option class (default handling, help text) and Command.main() for dynamic default resolution. Will keep edits additive/localized to minimize conflicts - let me know which specific methods/lines you're changing for batch_size.

type: STATUS
files: src/click/core.py:139-190(new module funcs _find_option_value/_resolve_dynamic_defaults),1412(main() hook),2689-2702(Option.__init__ dynamic default detection),2926-2933(get_help_extra dynamic display);src/click/types.py:1089-1095(convert_type dict inference)
summary: Finished dynamic-default feature implementation and all tests pass (739 passed). Diff is additive/localized to listed line ranges - should merge cleanly with batch_size changes elsewhere in same files.

type: STATUS
files: src/click/core.py:Option.__init__,Option.to_info_dict,Option.type_cast_value(~2645-2716)
summary: Finished batch_size feature: added Option(batch_size=...) param, validation (TypeError if not multiple, ValueError if negative), info_dict field, and type_cast_value override that chunks converted multiple values into tuples of batch_size. All existing tests pass except pre-existing test_info_dict.py assertions that don't yet expect the new batch_size key (expected, since spec requires always including it).
